body, the native will only have an earnest desire to be initiated into the religious order, but will
not attain fruition of his aim. So say Yavanas.
22. The native will attain religious order, if the Moon, posited in a decanate of Saturn, is aspected
by Mars and Saturn. The same effect is produced, if the Moon occupies the Navansa of
Aries/Scorpio in aspect to Saturn.
55

23. If the Lord of the Moon Sign receives the sole aspect of Saturn (i.e. unaspected by others
than Saturn), one will enter religious order. Even in this context, the earlier Yogas, if present
will only prevail.
24. If the Lord of the Moon Sign, bright with rays, lends his aspect to Saturn, while Saturn is in an
Angle, the native will lose his fortunes only to enter into a religious order.
25. If one among the Sun, the Moon and Jupiter be devoid of strength and occupy the Ascendant,
